title: Bridge Essay: Neural Pattern of Chanting-Driven Intuitive Inquiry Meditation in Expert Chan Pr

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.

**Neural Pattern of Chanting-Driven Intuitive Inquiry Meditation in Expert Chan Practitioners.** — Behav Sci (Basel). PMID: 41009242. DOI: 10.3390/bs15091213. Intuitive inquiry meditation (Can-Hua-Tou) is aunique mental practice which differs from relaxation-based practices by continuously demanding intuitive inquiry. It emphasizes the doubt-driven self-interrogation, also referred to as Chan/Zen meditation. Nonetheless, its electrophysiological signature remains poorly characterized. We recorded 128-channel EEG from 20 male Buddhist monks (5-28 years Can-Hua-Tou experience) and 18 male novice lay practitioners (<0.5 year) during three counter-balanc...
